items.title_en: Microsoft's LinkedIn names longtime exec Daniel Shapero its new CEO
items.title_zh: 微软 LinkedIn 任命长期高管 Daniel Shaper 为新任首席执行官
items.desc_en: Microsoft said Daniel Shapero will be the new CEO of LinkedIn, reporting to Ryan Roslansky, who held the job since 2020 and now has added responsibility.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，丹尼尔·沙佩罗 (Daniel Shapero) 将担任 LinkedIn 的新任首席执行官，向瑞安·罗斯兰斯基 (Ryan Roslansky) 汇报。瑞安·罗斯兰斯基自 2020 年起担任该职位，现在又承担了更多责任。

items.title_en: Trump family's crypto firm sued over alleged 'extortion'
items.title_zh: 特朗普家族的加密货币公司因涉嫌“勒索”而被起诉
items.desc_en: Billionaire investor Justin Sun is suing the family's World Liberty crypto venture after spending $45m on its tokens.
items.desc_zh: 亿万富翁投资者贾斯汀·孙 (Justin Sun) 在花费 4500 万美元购买其家族的 World Liberty 加密货币公司的代币后，正在起诉该公司。

items.title_en: Virginia redistricting referendum - CNN
items.title_zh: 弗吉尼亚州重新划分选区公投 - CNN

items.title_en: Tesla set to report first-quarter results after the bell
items.title_zh: 特斯拉将于盘后公布第一季度业绩
items.desc_en: Tesla's stock has underperformed all of its megacap peers so far this year as global competition ramps up in the electric vehicle market.
items.desc_zh: 随着电动汽车市场全球竞争的加剧，今年迄今为止，特斯拉的股价表现逊于所有大型同行。

items.title_en: House Republican proposes small-business tax cut to pair with GOP federal budget package
items.title_zh: 众议院共和党提议小企业减税，以配合共和党联邦预算方案
items.desc_en: Some congressional Republicans are hoping to tack on tax and other spending proposals to an effort to fully fund the Department of Homeland Security.
items.desc_zh: 一些国会共和党人希望通过税收和其他支出提案来为国土安全部提供充足的资金。

items.title_en: Strait of Hormuz remains basically closed as Iran seizes ships after Trump ceasefire extension
items.title_zh: 特朗普延长停火后，伊朗扣押船只，霍尔木兹海峡仍基本关闭
items.desc_en: Ship traffic in the Strait of Hormuz is still way below normal levels before the war when more than 100 vessels crossed daily.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通仍远低于战前的正常水平，当时每天有 100 多艘船只通过。

items.title_en: Brent oil rises above $100 after Iran seizes container ships, U.S. maintains naval blockade
items.title_zh: 伊朗扣押集装箱船、美国维持海上封锁后布伦特油价升至100美元以上
items.desc_en: Oil prices rose Wednesday after Iran's Revolutionary Guard said it seized two container ships as they tried to cross the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗革命卫队表示扣押了两艘试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡的集装箱船，周三油价上涨。

items.title_en: S&P 500 rises, Nasdaq hits new high after U.S. extends Iran ceasefire: Live updates
items.title_zh: 美国延长伊朗停火协议后，标准普尔 500 指数上涨，纳斯达克指数创下新高：实时更新
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump extended the U.S. ceasefire with Iran on Tuesday afternoon.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统周二下午延长了美国与伊朗的停火期限。

items.title_en: Trump administration in advanced talks for Spirit Airlines rescue package, source says
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，特朗普政府正在就精神航空救援计划进行高级谈判
items.desc_en: The Trump administration is preparing to rescue ailing budget carrier Spirit Airlines.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普政府正准备拯救陷入困境的廉价航空公司精神航空。

items.title_en: Bank of America double upgrades this software stock, sees big boost from AI
items.title_zh: 美国银行双倍升级该软件股票，看到人工智能的巨大推动
items.desc_en: The bank's research arm double upgraded the messaging software name to buy from underperform.
items.desc_zh: 该银行的研究部门将消息软件名称从表现不佳的股票升级为买入。

items.title_en: No cartels involved - but Mexico's pyramid attack prompts new concerns
items.title_zh: 不涉及卡特尔——但墨西哥的金字塔袭击引发了新的担忧
items.desc_en: The deadly shooting at a popular tourist site weeks before the World Cup has rocked Mexico.
items.desc_zh: 世界杯前几周，一处热门旅游景点发生致命枪击事件，震惊了墨西哥。

items.title_en: Life sciences lab real estate is clawing back from disaster. Here’s what that means for investors
items.title_zh: 生命科学实验室房地产正在从灾难中恢复过来。这对投资者意味着什么
items.desc_en: Life science laboratories saw a massive drop in demand last year after the NIH was forced to cancel billions of dollars in research grants.
items.desc_zh: 去年，在美国国立卫生研究院被迫取消数十亿美元的研究经费后，生命科学实验室的需求大幅下降。

items.title_en: Los Angeles becomes first major US school district to limit classroom screen time
items.title_zh: 洛杉矶成为美国第一个限制课堂屏幕时间的主要学区
items.desc_en: The school district, which serves about half a million students, is looking to reduce its reliance on devices after the pandemic.
items.desc_zh: 该学区为约 50 万学生提供服务，正在寻求在大流行后减少对设备的依赖。

items.title_zh: 波音公司表示，随着飞机交付量的增加，亏损收窄，预计今年将获得新的 737 Max 认证

items.desc_zh: 波音预计新的 Max 7 和 Max 10 型号将在今年晚些时候获得认证，并于 2027 年开始交付。

items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率再次下降，购房者重新涌入
items.desc_en: Mortgage demand continues to rebound as rates sink slightly lower.
items.desc_zh: 随着利率小幅下降，抵押贷款需求继续反弹。

items.title_zh: 由于燃油价格飙升，汉莎航空削减了 20,000 个夏季航班
items.desc_en: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.
items.desc_zh: 由于美以与伊朗的战争导致航空燃油价格飙升，该航空公司是最新一家削减航班的航空公司。

items.title_en: Two ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz, UK says, after U.S. extends Iran ceasefire
items.title_zh: 英国称，美国延长伊朗停火协议后，两艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡遭到袭击
items.desc_en: The attacks come shortly after President Donald Trump said the U.S. would extend the ceasefire with Iran to allow peace talks to continue.

items.title_en: Trump recounts Tim Cook call to 'kiss my ass,' in stark look at White House dealmaking
items.title_zh: 特朗普重述蒂姆·库克的“亲我屁股”呼吁，赤裸裸地看待白宫交易
items.desc_en: Tech executives from Amazon, Apple, Google and Meta have dined with Trump and donated millions to his inauguration fund and the White House ballroom.
items.desc_zh: 来自亚马逊、苹果、谷歌和 Meta 的科技高管曾与特朗普共进晚餐，并向他的就职基金和白宫宴会厅捐赠了数百万美元。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
